patch.value: pm search --status filter (parity with pm list)
pm list has --status; pm search has --type/--tag/--priority/--deadline but no --status, so search includes closed history noise by default. Add status parity.
pm search --status <csv> (open/closed/canceled aliases) applied pre-query; emitted in filters; CLI+contracts+MCP+completions+docs+tests; reuse list status parsing.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Shipped: pm search --status (CSV; open/closed/canceled workflow-group aliases + configured ids). Strict parse with did-you-mean hint on typos (shared core/item/status-filter.ts parseStatusFilterCsv, also adopted by pm list in lenient mode). Applied pre-query; echoed in filters block. Full wiring: commander, normalizeSearchOptions, SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS, TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS, commander-types, completions (bash/zsh/fish), MCP.
